general.name: Login Window
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>8D38E9E5-592E-44C0-BB7D-85E78C583B15</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>8D38E9E5-592E-44C0-BB7D-85E78C583B15</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Login Window</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>13BE6424-2EA0-4BCF-8FC6-4E0870F5DB3C</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.MCX</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>13BE6424-2EA0-4BCF-8FC6-4E0870F5DB3C</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>MCX</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>DisableGuestAccount</key><true/><key>EnableGuestAccount</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>CB356CC0-0F5D-466A-B92F-808582DCECE3</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>.GlobalPreferences</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>CB356CC0-0F5D-466A-B92F-808582DCECE3</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Login Window: Global Preferences</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>MultipleSessionEnabled</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>14EAF6A1-2A4E-4A14-878F-0F56596D1090</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.screensaver</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>14EAF6A1-2A4E-4A14-878F-0F56596D1090</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Login Window: Screen Saver Preferences</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>FAE1FE7B-5BE3-45F8-98ED-99175442C2AD</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.loginwindow</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>FAE1FE7B-5BE3-45F8-98ED-99175442C2AD</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Login Window</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>LoginwindowText</key><string>This system, network, and all information used or stored on them, are the property of Saks.com LLC. They are intended for authorized users only. Users have no expectation of privacy while using these tools, and your continued use signifies your agreement.</string><key>SHOWFULLNAME</key><false/><key>HideLocalUsers</key><false/><key>HideMobileAccounts</key><false/><key>IncludeNetworkUser</key><false/><key>HideAdminUsers</key><false/><key>SHOWOTHERUSERS_MANAGED</key><false/><key>ShutDownDisabled</key><false/><key>UseComputerNameForComputerRecordName</key><false/><key>EnableExternalAccounts</key><true/><key>DisableConsoleAccess</key><false/><key>AdminMayDisableMCX</key><false/><key>LocalUserLoginEnabled</key><true/><key>LocalUsersHaveWorkgroups</key><false/><key>FlattenUserWorkgroups</key><false/><key>CombineUserWorkgroups</key><true/><key>AlwaysShowWorkgroupDialog</key><false/><key>RetriesUntilHint</key><integer>0</integer><key>AllowList</key><array/><key>DenyList</key><array/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>5D9AFAEE-DB9F-4368-9CA1-E37370B0B443</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.mcxloginscripts</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>5D9AFAEE-DB9F-4368-9CA1-E37370B0B443</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Login Window: Scripts</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>skipLoginHook</key><false/><key>skipLogoutHook</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>7C6CD38E-26BE-48B0-9CDC-156C4C6F4284</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.SetupAssistant.managed</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>7C6CD38E-26BE-48B0-9CDC-156C4C6F4284</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Login Window: Setup Assistant</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>SkipCloudSetup</key><false/><key>SkipSiriSetup</key><false/></dict></array></dict></plist>
